tests.source_program:
define i32 @log2_ceil_i32(i32 %x) {
  %ctpop = call i32 @llvm.ctpop.i32(i32 %x)
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %ctpop, 1
  %zext = zext i1 %cmp to i32
  %ctlz = call i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32 %x, i1 true)
  %xor = xor i32 %ctlz, 31
  %add = add i32 %zext, %xor
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on ceil division idiom; log2_ceil pattern is mentioned as 'existing' but no log2_ceil tests are provided in the known test set, and i32 bitwidth variation is not covered

tests.source_program:
define i32 @ceil_div_i32(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %wo = call { i32, i1 } @llvm.uadd.with.overflow.i32(i32 %x, i32 %y)
  %ov = extractvalue { i32, i1 } %wo, 1
  %ov.not = xor i1 %ov, true
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %ov.not)
  %nonzero = icmp ne i32 %x, 0
  %bias = zext i1 %nonzero to i32
  %sub = sub i32 %x, %bias
  %div = udiv i32 %sub, %y
  %add = add i32 %div, %bias
  ret i32 %add
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: All existing known tests use i8 bitwidth; i32 variation tests the generalization across different integer widths not explicitly covered in summary

alive2.src:
define i32 @ceil_div_i32(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %wo = call { i32, i1 } @llvm.uadd.with.overflow.i32(i32 %x, i32 %y)
  %ov = extractvalue { i32, i1 } %wo, 1
  %ov.not = xor i1 %ov, true
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %ov.not)
  %nonzero = icmp ne i32 %x, 0
  %bias = zext i1 %nonzero to i32
  %sub = sub i32 %x, %bias
  %div = udiv i32 %sub, %y
  %add = add i32 %div, %bias
  ret i32 %add
}

tests.source_program:
define i64 @log2_ceil_i64_with_trunc(i64 %x) {
  %ctpop = call i64 @llvm.ctpop.i64(i64 %x)
  %cmp = icmp ne i64 %ctpop, 1
  %zext = zext i1 %cmp to i64
  %ctlz = call i64 @llvm.ctlz.i64(i64 %x, i1 true)
  %trunc = trunc i64 %ctlz to i32
  %zext2 = zext i32 %trunc to i64
  %xor = xor i64 %zext2, 63
  %add = add i64 %zext, %xor
  ret i64 %add
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: The pattern matcher includes m_TruncOrSelf for ctlz result but no existing test demonstrates explicit truncation/zext chain; i64 bitwidth also not tested in known cases

alive2.src:

  %zext2 = zext i32 %trunc to i64
  %xor = xor i64 %zext2, 63

}
